name: Tata Steel
description: India's largest steel producer and a global steel major. Listed on BSE/NSE. Part of the Tata Group. Operates across the full steel value chain from mining to finished products.
objectives: Maximise shareholder value and maintain market leadership in India
Protect profit margins despite raw material cost volatility
Expand domestic market share while maintaining strategic export presence
Maintain credit rating and balance sheet strength
constraints: Capital-intensive operations with high fixed costs
Dependent on iron ore and coking coal — subject to global commodity pricing
Long investment cycles — capacity expansion takes 3-5 years
Workforce of 70,000+ employees — social responsibility obligations

europe_operations.status: Restructuring — high energy costs impacting profitability
